$comment: Stellar Light golden-question retrieval eval. We're the data/index layer, so each question is graded (case-insensitive) over the TOP-K SURFACED CONTENT. `mode` routes to the endpoint: research → /api/research (content), projects → /api/projects/search (projects), repos → /api/repos/search (code references). `answerRegex` = patterns that must EACH surface (the right thing shows up). `forbiddenRegex` = patterns that must NOT surface — the correctness check: a wrong/stale fact in the top-k FAILS the case even when the topic matched. `liveSource: true` marks live-network facts the static corpus isn't meant to answer (reported N/A). `expectUrlIncludes` = a substring an expected doc URL should contain. `minTopScore` = the best result's score must clear it: for research it's the vector cosine; for repos it's the leading repo's repoScore (0-100) — a QUALITY FLOOR so junk can't be the #1 code reference for a tech query. Storing isn't enough; the right content has to surface, the wrong content must not, and the top reference has to be quality.

questions.question: How do I charge AI agents per API call on Stellar?
Which SEP should an anchor implement for hosted deposits and withdrawals, and how does authentication work?
What is a trustline on Stellar and why do I need one?
Write a minimal Soroban contract that stores a counter and increments it.
How do I connect the Freighter wallet in a React app and submit a payment?
How do I issue a regulated asset on Stellar with clawback enabled?
Should I use Horizon or Stellar RPC for a new indexer, and how do I stream contract events?
I want to build a USDC remittance app on Stellar for the Philippines corridor. Where do I start?
Tell me about the Blend protocol on Stellar — is it safe to build on?
What reentrancy or auth bugs have auditors found in Soroban contracts?
real-world asset RWA tokenization
agent payments x402 API monetization
defi yield aggregator lending
How does the Stellar Consensus Protocol reach agreement across nodes?
How does require_auth and authorization work in a Soroban contract?
How do passkeys and smart wallets work on Stellar?
How are Stellar transaction fees and the inclusion fee calculated?
How do path payments and the Stellar DEX order book work?
How do I emit events from a Soroban contract and subscribe to them?
How does the Stellar Community Fund Build Award work and what do I submit?
What security issues have auditors found in Stellar DeFi or token contracts?
How many active developers does Stellar have according to Electric Capital?
stablecoin anchor off-ramp USDC
wallet passkey smart account
What is the current base reserve on Stellar mainnet?

expect.note: Live network value — served by adapters/RPC, not the static research corpus.

questions.question: Which version of soroban-sdk should I pin today for a brand-new contract?

expect.note: Today's pinned version is a live fact (crates.io) — not the static corpus's job.

questions.question: zk
oracle price feed
streaming payments
escrow vault
soroswap
bridge assets from EVM to Stellar

expect.note: The 2026-07-09 demo miss: Starbridge (2022 research protocol, never productionized) chunks filled the top-K twice over while current routes (CCTP/USDC, Allbridge) sat at ranks 11-20. Guards the research-rank stage: per-doc dedupe + confidence (freshness/authority) ordering. Starbridge surfacing for consumer bridge intent = stale-advice failure, same class as recommending wasm32-unknown-unknown.

questions.question: solana to stellar bridge

expect.note: Corridor-matrix guard (2026-07-09): Solana corridors were invisible because supportedNetworks was seeded [stellar, evm] only. Allbridge (docs: Solana live) and Rozo/CCTP (Solana live) must surface for the Solana corridor. Generalizes the bridge-evm-to-stellar research guard to the projects lane + a second chain.

questions.question: latest soroban release
recent mainnet upgrade
blend oracle manipulation incident
yieldblox oracle incident

expect.note: sls-022 (upstream #513): the incident row served 'May 2026, attempted & contained, $61 million in XLM'. Truth (Blockaid 2026-05-20 + BlockSec 2026-02-26): COMPLETED drain on 2026-02-22 of 61,249,278 XLM + ~1,000,197 USDC (~$10.2M); ~48M XLM later quarantined — quarantine is not recovery. The corrected curated record (cited to Blockaid) must be the top result; the wrong dating/amount phrasing must not surface. Expected to fail until the next refresh-research-corpus incident run lands.

sls-019 (upstream #510): q=CAP-0038&source=cap ranked its own document 23rd — cross-referencing CAPs won the vector race. An exact canonical identifier is a retrieval KEY: the named doc must be rank 1, and no URL may fill two slots of the page.

questions.question: CAP 58

expect.note: sls-019 variant-form lock: the space form CAP 58 must normalize to cap-0058 and retrieve it at rank 1 (live rank was 11).

questions.question: Asset Clawback

expect.note: sls-019 dedup lock: q=Asset+Clawback&source=cap served cap-0035.md nine times in one 25-slot page — the source-starved vector pool made the per-doc collapse refill with duplicates. With the widened filtered pool, every URL in the page must be unique while distinct CAP docs exist.

questions.question: Effective 7 MAY 2026 SDF consolidated bug bounty single HackerOne Immunefi deprecated

expect.note: sls-020 (Tyler's exact transition wording, expected top-3 → limit 3): the 2026-05-07 consolidation record must surface with the effective date, the single HackerOne program, the deprecated general Immunefi program, and the separate active OpenZeppelin-on-Stellar carve-out. Expected to fail until the first ingest-security-program run lands.

expect.note: sls-055 q-org-sdf-structure-mandate (broad lane, no source filter — mirrors the consumer's own fan-out): the current Mandate page's self-funded/pays-taxes wording must surface top-3 (the Terms page carries the companion Delaware non-profit wording). Expected to fail until the first ingest-sdf-org run lands.
